text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I received a taiyaki from Falcon earlier.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I can't eat it until my break, which is<n>still a
whole eighty-three seconds away...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A moderate amount of sugar after<n>practice works
wonders for the fatigue<n>we feel after exerting
ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Is it just me, or is time moving slower<n>today?
